values.title: Community First
values.description: We hire local guides, stay in locally owned accommodation, and contribute directly to the communities that host our tours.

values.title: No Shortcuts
values.description: Every experience we sell is one we've personally done. If it isn't worth sending our closest friends on, it isn't in our catalogue.

values.title: Sustainable by Design
values.description: Sustainable travel means the people who live where you're visiting are genuinely better off because you came. We build that in from the start.

testimonials.name: Sarah K.
testimonials.quote: I've done group travel before and it usually feels rushed. This felt like being taken somewhere by a friend who actually lives there. The Bribri day was the best single day I've had traveling in years.

testimonials.name: Marcus T.
testimonials.quote: The reef at Manzanillo is unlike anything I've snorkeled in the Caribbean. Our guide knew every corner of it. The fact that it's this healthy and this uncrowded feels like a secret the internet hasn't ruined yet.

testimonials.name: Diane & Rob
testimonials.quote: We've been traveling together for 25 years and this was genuinely one of the top five trips we've ever taken. The villa, the chef dinner on the beach, the snorkeling — and nobody else around. Worth every cent.
